## Opinion: Apple Predicted to Surpass Nvidia's $5 Trillion Market Cap

Purely editorial; relevant only as a sentiment signal on relative AAPL vs. NVDA positioning — not a fundamental read. Worth noting if AAPL-outperformance-over-NVDA becomes a consensus theme in coverage, but no action warranted from this cluster alone.

- Prediction piece argues AAPL will soon overtake NVDA as the world's most valuable company
- NVDA's market cap is cited at $5 trillion in the headline
- Rationale is described as hiding in plain sight — no specific detail is disclosed in the headline
- Low classifier confidence; editorial opinion with no new fundamental catalyst
